remove.reason: EXACT DUPLICATE - Rules are doing the same thing. aws.costexplorer.costcategory.billing_console_rbac_least_privilege has equal compliance attachments (0 vs 0). These should not both exist.

keep.reason: More comprehensive - checks 2 fields (includes all 1 fields from aws.costexplorer.cost_allocation_tag.untagged_resource_alerts_enabled). Subset relationships are acceptable, but exact duplicates are not.

remove.reason: Field subset - checks only 1 of 2 fields. aws.costexplorer.cost_allocation_tag.cost_tag_policy_enforced is more comprehensive. This is a subset relationship (acceptable), not an exact duplicate.

aws.costexplorer.anomalydetector.alert_d.metadata_intent: Check that anomaly subscriptions have alert destinations configured (Subscribers exists)
issues_found: Discovery emit used item: instead of items_for: for array response
Field path in check was item.AnomalySubscriptions.Subscribers instead of item.Subscribers
fixes_applied: Changed emit to use items_for pattern for AnomalySubscriptions array
Fixed field path from item.AnomalySubscriptions.Subscribers to item.Subscribers

aws.costexplorer.anomalydetector.costexp.metadata_intent: Check that anomaly monitors are enabled (MonitorArn exists)
issues_found: Same emit structure issue as alert_destinations_configured
Field path was item.AnomalyMonitors.MonitorArn instead of item.MonitorArn
fixes_applied: Changed emit to use items_for pattern for AnomalyMonitors array
Fixed field path from item.AnomalyMonitors.MonitorArn to item.MonitorArn

aws.costexplorer.anomalydetector.costexp.metadata_intent: Check that anomaly subscriptions have severity thresholds configured
issues_found: Field paths were item.AnomalySubscriptions.Threshold instead of item.Threshold
fixes_applied: Fixed field paths to item.Threshold and item.ThresholdExpression

aws.costexplorer.cost_allocation_tag.cos.metadata_intent: Check that cost allocation tags are active and of type CostAllocationTag
aws.costexplorer.cost_allocation_tag.cos.yaml_checks: Checks item.Status equals Active and item.Type equals CostAllocationTag
issues_found: Field paths were item.CostAllocationTags.Status instead of item.Status
fixes_applied: Fixed field paths from item.CostAllocationTags.* to item.*

aws.costexplorer.cost_allocation_tag.cos.metadata_intent: Check that required cost tags are present and active
aws.costexplorer.cost_allocation_tag.cos.yaml_checks: Checks item.TagKey exists and item.Status equals Active
issues_found: Same field path issue as other cost_allocation_tag rules
fixes_applied: Fixed field paths to match emit structure

aws.costexplorer.cost_allocation_tag.unt.metadata_intent: Check that untagged resource alerts are enabled
fixes_applied: Fixed field path from item.CostAllocationTags.Status to item.Status

aws.costexplorer.costcategory.billing_ad.metadata_intent: Check that cost categories exist (for MFA requirement validation)
issues_found: Field path was item.CostCategoryReferences.CostCategoryArn instead of item.CostCategoryArn
Emit had wrong paths: item.CostCategoryReferences.EffectiveStart instead of item.EffectiveStart
fixes_applied: Fixed emit field paths to remove CostCategoryReferences prefix
Fixed check field path to item.CostCategoryArn

aws.costexplorer.costcategory.billing_co.metadata_intent: Check that cost categories have proper RBAC configuration
aws.costexplorer.costcategory.billing_co.yaml_checks: Checks CostCategoryArn, Name exist and NumberOfRules > 0
issues_found: Same field path issues as billing_admins_mfa_required
fixes_applied: Fixed all field paths to match emit structure

aws.costexplorer.costcategory.costexplor.metadata_intent: Check that cost data exports are private and encrypted
aws.costexplorer.costcategory.costexplor.yaml_checks: Checks ProcessingStatus equals ENCRYPTED and DefaultValue equals PRIVATE
issues_found: Metadata mapping says use describe_cost_category_definition but YAML used list_cost_category_definitions
Field paths were item.CostCategory.ProcessingStatus but should use describe response
fixes_applied: Added describe_cost_category_definition discovery dependent on list_cost_category_definitions
Fixed field paths to use response.CostCategory.* in emit and item.* in checks

aws.costexplorer.costcategory.costexplor.metadata_intent: Check that cost export destinations have least privilege
aws.costexplorer.costcategory.costexplor.yaml_checks: Checks CostCategoryArn, Name exist and NumberOfRules > 0
issues_found: Same field path issues as other costcategory rules
fixes_applied: Fixed all field paths to match emit structure
